subject: [PATCH v2 07/21] nfsd: validate nseconds in TIME_DELEG decode paths

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds range checks to prevent a malformed timespec from being stored in the Linux kernel's NFS server implementation. The checks are added to two files, nfs4xdr.c and nfs4callback.c, which handle SETATTR and CB_GETATTR paths respectively. The checks ensure that the nseconds value is less than NSEC_PER_SEC, preventing potential issues with notify_change() propagating malformed timespeces to disk.
